name: aqura
description: Aqura Management System - PWA-first windowed management platform

scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter backend lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter frontend format && pnpm --filter backend format
scripts.test: pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm --filter backend test
scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm --filter frontend install && cd backend && go mod download
